data.topic_ideas:
# | Video Title | Core Institutional Focus
---|---|---
1 | Why Karnataka Gets ₹15 For Every ₹100 It Pays (And Why Everyone's Mad About It) | Finance Commission horizontal devolution formula and the "rich state penalty"
2 | The 73 Seconds That Made Mumbai and Pune Different States — Forever | States Reorganisation Act 1956 and linguistic boundary commission decisions
3 | Why Goa Has 12 MLAs Per Million People But UP Has 1 (And Yes, That's Completely Legal) | Delimitation freeze of 1976 and the unintended constitutional malapportionment
4 | The Clause That Makes The President Ask The Governor To Ask The CM To Maybe Resign | Article 356 President's Rule and the bizarre constitutional choreography of state dismissals
5 | Why Buying Land In Himachal Requires The Government's Permission But Bihar Doesn't | Article 371 special provisions for hill states vs. uniform property rights framework

data.title: The Clause That Makes The President Ask The Governor To Ask The CM To Maybe Resign
